journeys.actor: anonymous shopper becoming a verified local account
steps: discover a quoted product through home, search, a department, or Deals
open the local PDP and choose a complete source-quoted option combination
add multiple sibling variants without overwriting either cart line
sign in or register and verify the local email flow
select an owned address and supported delivery option
choose an approved local sandbox card or bank method
place the order once with server re-quotation and idempotency
refresh order history and progress the local shipment to delivered
create or update a local review whose Verified Purchase flag is server-derived

journeys.actor: shopper encountering invalid or stale input
steps: see option values with no reachable quote disabled before selection
have forged ASIN, option, quantity, owner, and cross-origin mutations rejected
receive a deterministic declined sandbox payment without an order or funds claim
have stale cart or checkout state re-quoted and reconciled instead of silently committed
retry a duplicate place-order action without creating a second order

journeys.actor: shopper recovering identity, payment, or post-order state
steps: enter an unknown sign-in email and continue through registration
verify the email locally or exercise bounded SMTP delivery and retry states
request password recovery without account enumeration
switch from declined card to an approved sandbox method
cancel before fulfillment or request a return after simulated delivery
refresh and observe durable cancelled, returned, or refunded state
